params.name: History of Animals
params.description: The History of Animals is a biological work by ancient Greek philosopher Aristotle, recording his observations and research on animal classification, anatomy, morphology, habits, and reproduction. This work is not only a foundational work of ancient biology but also provides important references for the study of animal classification and behavior. It was widely disseminated during the Middle Ages and had a profound impact on the natural sciences during the Renaissance, regarded as an important l …
